query: arXiv Attention Is All You Need submitted date
answer: "Attention Is All You Need" was submitted to arXiv on June 12, 2017. The paper proposes the Transformer architecture. The latest version is v7.

results.title: Attention Is All You Need - arXiv
results.snippet: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.
